assertions.evidence: Runs `git status --short`, `git branch --show-current`, `git branch --merged`, and `git worktree list --porcelain` before cleanup.
Instructs updating `.spec-to-ship/features/<feature-id>/finish.md` with verification evidence, approved option, commands, and final status.
Removes only exact clean worktree path, deletes branch with `git branch -d`, prunes after safe removal, and avoids force deletion.
